title: 6 Data Hub Navigation and Tools
body_text:
6	Data Hub Navigation and Tools
6.1	Home Page Navigation
The Data Hub home page is structured as follows. See Figure 1.
Note:	Data Hub is provided through Microsoft Power BI and includes a range of standard features. Although youГўВҖВҷre welcome to explore these features, Central 1 does not support them. A few key features are described below.
